name: S-12 (SS-117)
events: 15 Jun 1943 USS S-12 departed the Panama Canal Zone for Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.
20 Jun 1943 USS S-12 arrived at Guantanamo Bay, Cuba from the Panama Canal Zone.
27 Aug 1943 USS S-12 departed St. Thomas, Virgin Island for Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.
30 Aug 1943 USS S-12 arrive at Guantanamo Bay, Cuba from St. Thomas, Virgin Island.
14 Dec 1943 USS S-12 departed Guantanamo Bay, Cuba for Coco Solo, Panama Canal Zone.
18 Dec 1943 USS S-12 arrived in the Panama Canal Zone from Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.
31 Oct 1944 USS S-12 departed Guantanamo Bay, Cuba for the Panama Canal Zone.
4 Nov 1944 USS S-12 arrived in the Panama Canal Zone from Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.
3 Dec 1944 USS S-12 departed the Panama Canal Zone for Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.
7 Dec 1944 USS S-12 arrived at Guantanamo Bay, Cuba from the Panama Canal Zone.
24 Mar 1945 USS S-12 departed Guantanamo Bay, Cuba for New London, Connecticut.
2 Apr 1945 USS S-12 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.
27 Apr 1945 USS S-12 departed New London, Connecticut for the Philadelphia Navy Yard.
28 Apr 1945 USS S-12 arrived at the Philadelphia Navy Yard.
